calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Concerning Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-15-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PETITIONER SWIFT FINANCIAL, LLC's Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Petitioner's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted as unopposed.

Order signed. Separate judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Sean Kane; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR No. 8600, Email: maria.torreano@gmail.com. (302/RBU)
